ideal_must_detect.matched_text: not generally known to the market
acquire a 55% stake in Bay Zenith Digital Limited
no personal emails or phone numbers should be used or recorded

Positive MNPI (limited to this line): a draft board paper not released publicly authorises management to negotiate a non-binding term sheet to acquire a 55% stake in Bay Zenith Digital Limited; no timetable or consideration has been agreed and this is not generally known to the market.

External communications must rely only on published announcements, circulars (if any), and the 2024 annual report; analyst Q&A is to be limited to previously disseminated facts and stale guidance as appropriate.

must_detect.matched_text:
Internal memo: Compliance review of disclosure status — Orchid Reef Holdings Limited (stock code 09X8; non-ISIN ZX0000000000) under SFO/PDPO/HKEX Listing Rules context.
This note collates public/stale materials and routine controls; no inside information is intended to be circulated other than the single flagged item below for board awareness.
Public record: HKEXnews announcement dated 03 January 2025 (LTN20250103-ORH, illustrative) on the completed disposal of Orchid Reef (Tianjin) Limited; the disposal was categorized as below Chapter 14 thresholds and no circular was required.
Public record: FY2024 annual results were published on 28 March 2025, and the director dealing blackout under Appendix 10 (Model Code) closed on that date; this reference is made for clarity and is not a live trading window notification.
Press/industry context: multiple trade publications in April 2025 reported general sector consolidation among electronics assemblers; these articles are broad, not issuer-specific, and do not constitute MNPI.
Operational update (public): the Company’s IR presentation deck dated 02 May 2025 is available on the corporate website and mirrors information already in the 2024 annual report and March results announcement.
PDPO handling: HR’s draft offer letter templates will remove personal data fields before circulation, and any CVs in deal rooms will be redacted or replaced with role descriptors in line with the PDPO’s “data user” obligations.
SFO Part XIVA: any inside information will be announced via HKEXnews as soon as reasonably practicable per s.307B, with no selective disclosure to analysts or investors prior to publication.
Positive MNPI (limited to this line): a draft board paper not released publicly authorises management to negotiate a non-binding term sheet to acquire a 55% stake in Bay Zenith Digital Limited; no timetable or consideration has been agreed and this is not generally known to the market.
If leakage is suspected, a trading halt request will be prepared and an announcement will be made; until then, only the Company Secretary and inside list (template only, blank) custodians are to be briefed to avoid any selective disclosure.
Public/stale governance item: the SFC’s Guidance Note on Inside Information (August 2015) and HKEX GL97-18 are referenced for timing and content expectations; these are general frameworks, not issuer-specific instructions.
Non-issuer update (public): Sapphire Arc Capital Fund LP disclosed a passive 4.9% long position in sector peer Nova Stride Holdings on its website in 2024; this does not relate to the Company’s operations and should not be treated as issuer MNPI.
Share register reference (public): CCASS shareholding reports for March–April 2025 show routine nominee movements; there is no Board knowledge of any concert party or take-private proposal beyond public filings.
External communications must rely only on published announcements, circulars (if any), and the 2024 annual report; analyst Q&A is to be limited to previously disseminated facts and stale guidance as appropriate.
IR contact point (role mailbox): ir@orchidreef.example; no personal emails or phone numbers should be used or recorded in relation to this note.
Conclusion: other than the single non-public term-sheet authorisation described above, all items herein are public, stale, or immaterial on an issuer-relative basis and do not trigger
